title: FMD - Using Play Button when only one earbud is connected
scenario: Find My Device tone plays correctly on connected earbud when only one earbud is disconnected
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Pair both earbuds to the phone via Bluetooth.
Verify the device appears on the Find My Device map/list within the app.
Disconnect one earbud (e.g., left earbud) by placing it in the charging case or turning it off.
On the Home screen, tap the device name → Device Settings → Find My Device.
Tap 'Play Sound' to trigger a tone on the connected earbud.
Observe the app UI for animated feedback: 'Sending tone...' message, a Stop button, and an animated illustration.
Verify the tone plays audibly on the connected earbud.
Tap the Stop button to stop the tone.
Reconnect the disconnected earbud and disconnect the other earbud (e.g., right earbud).
Repeat steps 5–9 for the newly connected earbud.
expected: The Find My Device tone plays on the connected earbud only, with animated UI feedback ('Sending tone...' message, Stop button, animated illustration). The tone stops when the Stop button is tapped. The process works identically regardless of which earbud is disconnected.
